tasks.title: spawnOne() silently swallows factory exceptions, hiding pool starvation cause
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial fix: log and re-throw (or log before break) in bare catch block

tasks.title: Worker addEventListener wiring failures silently swallowed, hiding lifecycle errors
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: chain original error as cause on the downstream throw

tasks.title: ensureLoaded() silently swallows all postMessage errors per worker
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: log caught error before the bare catch continues

tasks.title: destroy() setInterval leak when active workers never drain: interval not cleared on grace timeout
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: capture iv outside Promise and clearInterval in finally/after race

tasks.title: getOrParseJxtcTileIndex: tilesX * tilesY multiplication can overflow before bounds check
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add numTiles cap guard before Uint32Array allocation

tasks.title: ensureIccProfile silently swallows all errors and always resolves null on failure
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: log error in catch before returning null

tasks.title: Progressive Phase 1 DC errors with fail-fast policy propagate as non-PyramidError, losing typed error code
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: wrap thrown error in PyramidError with JXTC_PARSE code on re-throw

tasks.title: prewarmAsync fire-and-forget in constructor creates unhandled promise rejection on spawn failure
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add .catch(e => console.warn(...)) to void prewarmAsync calls at lines 310 and 801

tasks.title: Aspect ratio validation uses division without guarding height=0
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add height > 0 guard before division

tasks.title: decodeTileBytesProgressive: events() async iterator abandonment on decoder.push() throw leaks decoder
tasks.reason_for_tier: straightforward but requires careful async iterator cleanup; await drainOutcome.catch in finally

tasks.title: getOrCreatePool: pool.destroy(0) called fire-and-forget when factory changes, hiding destroy errors
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add .catch() to void pool.destroy(0) and null assignments

tasks.title: deadlineHit failedTiles loop uses hardcoded level=0 instead of source.level
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial one-liner: replace hardcoded 0 with source.level ?? 0 at line 395

tasks.title: dc-then-final pooled path fires final onTile for cache-hits before the final decode pass runs
tasks.reason_for_tier: straightforward: reorder onTile calls so cache-hit finals fire after misses decode

tasks.title: convergedByteEnd == bytes is accepted but should be rejected as non-truncating
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial one-liner: change cbe > bytes to cbe >= bytes

tasks.title: Cache quality key for dc-only mode: pooled path always uses final cache key
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: use computed cacheQuality in pooled path; finding notes dc-only is guard-excluded so risk is low

tasks.title: decodeTilesParallel total progress count is halved for dc-only progressive mode
tasks.reason_for_tier: uncertain impact — needs investigation of dc-only callers before changing multiplier logic

tasks.title: armAllExcessIdle iterates in LIFO (hottest) order but reaping should prefer FIFO (coldest)
tasks.reason_for_tier: straightforward but requires understanding of LIFO acquire semantics before reversing iterator direction

tasks.title: Opportunity: validateLevel does not verify that w, h, bytes are positive integers
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add w > 0, h > 0, bytes > 0 checks after requireNumber calls

tasks.title: makeTiledSource helper omits tilesX/tilesY from the returned LevelSource object
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial test helper fix; uncertain verdict means verify TypeScript compilation first

tasks.title: Opportunity: tilesOverlappingRegion property test does not verify full coverage
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add expect(covered).toBe(region.w * region.h) assertion for non-edge cases

tasks.title: Unvalidated opaque metadata object passed through verbatim from untrusted manifest JSON
tasks.reason_for_tier: straightforward: add depth/key-count cap; requires deciding acceptable limits

tasks.title: ProducedBy.params stored without sanitisation allows attacker-controlled opaque dict
tasks.reason_for_tier: same pattern as security-1; share the sanitization helper

tasks.title: Level numeric fields (w, h, bytes, tileSize, cols, rows) have no upper-bound checks, enabling OOM via crafted manifest
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add sensible upper-bound constants for each field

tasks.title: contenthash accepted as any non-empty string with no format constraint, enabling cache-key confusion
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: validate contenthash matches /^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/ or similar safe pattern

tasks.title: master.name accepted as arbitrary string with no path-traversal sanitisation
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add length cap and reject path-separator characters

tasks.title: ensureIccProfile writes result onto an arbitrary source object via dynamic property assignment
tasks.reason_for_tier: straightforward: replace property-stamp pattern with WeakMap cache

tasks.title: parseWorkerReply trusts worker-supplied w/h dimensions without upper-bound checks
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add w/h upper-bound checks in parseWorkerReply

tasks.title: Hand-rolled validator duplicates Zod/Valibot pattern without exhaustive numeric-range contracts
tasks.reason_for_tier: architectural decision: whether to adopt schema library or extend hand-rolled validator

tasks.title: Module-level singleton pool has no mutex: concurrent callers can race to create/swap the pool
tasks.reason_for_tier: straightforward: add a creation-in-progress promise guard to serialize concurrent getOrCreatePool calls

tasks.title: prewarmAsync state transition races: concurrent calls can push state back to Prewarming after Active
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: guard prewarmAsync with early-return if already Prewarming or Active

tasks.title: buffersInFlight check-then-add is not atomic: two concurrent decodes with same outBuffer can both pass the guard
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: move buffersInFlight.add immediately after the has() check

tasks.title: destroy() leaks active-drain interval on exception and uses polling instead of Promise-based drain
tasks.reason_for_tier: same root cause as errors-5; fix together by capturing iv and clearing in finally

tasks.title: decodeTilesParallel coroutine loop checks failed/aborted after awaiting, not before claiming tile index
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: move abort/failed check to before next++ in each coroutine loop iteration

tasks.title: decodeTiledViewportPooled does not release acquired handles on the empty-handles early-exit path; buffersInFlight also not cleaned
tasks.reason_for_tier: straightforward: move early-exit path inside try/finally block or add explicit release/buffersInFlight.delete

tasks.title: Module-level idCounter and WeakMaps in cache.ts are not safe if multiple realm instances share the same module
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add defensive WorkerGlobalScope assertion or document realm isolation contract

tasks.title: Waiter queue in acquire() uses plain setTimeout for expiry but does not cancel the timeout on early resolution
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: store timer id on waiter object and clearTimeout on early resolve in release()

tasks.title: Per-tile grid-origin and expectedLen recomputed twice in the same function for cache hits and partial-hit paths
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: pre-compute tile geometry once alongside hit/miss categorization

tasks.title: Per-tile grid-origin arithmetic duplicated in dc-phase and final-phase of progressive dc-then-final direct path
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add tileGeom field to tilesWithBytes in single map pass

tasks.title: O(n) deduplication of failedTiles using Set<string> + tileKey() allocates per-tile strings at end of decode
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: accumulate a Set<string> during phase loops to avoid post-pass dedup allocation

tasks.title: Two intermediate arrays (tileBytesList + tilesWithBytes) allocated for every progressive viewport decode
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: merge the two .map() calls into a single pass

tasks.title: Center-out sort allocates a new array and recomputes distances per tile on every viewport decode
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: pre-compute distances once then sort with O(1) comparator

tasks.title: Center-out sort of misses array allocates and recomputes per viewport decode in pooled path
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: same Schwartzian transform fix as perf-5

tasks.title: _reapBound uses Array.includes() (O(n)) to check idle membership on every timer fire
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add inIdle boolean flag on WorkerHandle

tasks.title: destroyHandle uses Array.indexOf() + Array.splice() to remove handle from idle list (O(n) scan)
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: use the inIdle flag from perf-7 fix to skip indexOf

tasks.title: setHandleState allocates a new allowed[] array on every state transition via object literal
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: hoist the allowed table as module-level const

tasks.title: destroy() iterates pending jobs via Array.from(h.pending.values()) allocating a snapshot array
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: iterate h.pending.values() directly (Map deletion during forward iteration is safe in JS)

tasks.title: cacheStore always calls pixels.slice() even when byteLength == need (no surplus)
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: skip slice when byteLength === need and caller can transfer ownership

tasks.title: Per-tile final-cache and dc-cache lookups cause N independent cache.get() calls with N string key allocations
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: pre-build tile key map before phase loops

tasks.title: bytesId constructs template-literal string on every call even on WeakMap hit path
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add second WeakMap keyed on Uint8Array view to cache full composite string

tasks.title: No tile-decode throughput benchmark or regression gate exists for the jxl-pyramid package
tasks.reason_for_tier: needs architectural decision on benchmark approach and CI integration

tasks.title: decodeTilesParallel coro fan-out creates one async closure per handle per viewport decode
tasks.reason_for_tier: complex refactor to extract shared coroutine function; requires careful state management

tasks.title: DecodedLevel.format is optional but all decode paths set it — callers cannot rely on its presence without a type guard
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: change format?: PixelFormat to format: PixelFormat

tasks.title: ensureLoaded sends SAB load message with non-standard fields not defined in WorkerRequest type
tasks.reason_for_tier: straightforward: add SAB variant to WorkerRequest union type to remove as any cast

tasks.title: parsePyramidManifest normalizes schema 1 to 2 but return type declares schema: 1|2
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: narrow return type to schema: 2 or add overload

tasks.title: decodeTilesParallel resolves worker jobs with DecodedLevel missing format field
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add format field to job.resolve call at line 667

tasks.title: parseJxtcHeader throws plain Error, not PyramidError — callers cannot catch by code and error taxonomy is broken
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: replace new Error(...) with new PyramidError('JXTC_PARSE', ...) throughout tiling.ts

tasks.title: Direct non-pooled path stamps iccProfile via (result as any).iccProfile instead of typed field assignment
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: replace (result as any).iccProfile = icc with typed result.iccProfile = icc

tasks.title: decodeTiledViewportPooled overloads omit pool option from the Uint8Array first-argument form
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add pool to the Uint8Array overload options type

tasks.title: No runtime validation of outbound WorkerRequest messages
tasks.reason_for_tier: straightforward: add validateWorkerRequest dev-mode assertion mirroring parseWorkerReply

tasks.title: WorkerRequest/WorkerReply are versioned with literal v:1 but there is no version negotiation
tasks.reason_for_tier: architectural decision: version negotiation approach; complex to add without breaking existing workers

tasks.title: Tiling descriptor cols/rows are not validated against w/h/tileSize
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add cross-validation of cols === Math.ceil(w/tileSize) and rows === Math.ceil(h/tileSize)

tasks.title: PyramidErrorCode uses open string & {} union, preventing exhaustive handling by callers
tasks.category: no structured error taxonomy / sentinel errors
tasks.reason_for_tier: type design decision: introduce UnknownPyramidErrorCode alias vs accepting open union

tasks.title: acquire() maxWaitMs defaults to 60ms with no diagnostic when timeout fires
tasks.reason_for_tier: trivial: add console.warn or structured logging when acquire timeout fires with partial handles

tasks.title: GalleryIndex.next pagination cursor accepted without format validation
tasks.defer_reason: Verdict is uncertain — exploitability depends on whether callers use .next as a URL without further validation. Cannot confirm SSRF risk without reading all consumers of GalleryIndex.next. Deferred pending consumer audit.

tasks.title: No evidence of npm audit or Dependabot configuration for transitive dependency vulnerabilities
tasks.defer_reason: Verdict is uncertain — cannot confirm absence of CI config without reading .github/workflows or package.json scripts outside the reviewed file paths.
